[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A mobile news/article page shows a Crunchyroll news post in Indonesian with a large headline about an anime adaptation and an illustrated anime-style face and background image.

The main visual focus is the article content on a smartphone screen: at the top there are navigation and status icons, followed by a large bold headline, a subtitle paragraph, an author line, and a square section containing an anime-style illustration of a character with light hair and green eyes. The illustration shows a close-up of a pale-haired anime character facing forward, with short white hair and bangs, green eyes, and a dark, high-collared outfit; one shoulder area shows a dark strap or bag-like shape. The character’s expression appears neutral and slightly serious, with a thin mouth and direct gaze.

The setting is a digital screen capture of a mobile webpage. The background behind the text is predominantly dark (black or very dark gray) with bright white and orange text elements. Above the article text, a banner area includes a visible “Crunchyroll” logo and “news,” and there is a thin top status bar with multiple small icons. The time and weather conditions are not clearly visible, but the “Diterbitkan” and “Diperbarui” lines show dates and times in Indonesian.

Visual details include strong contrast between white text and a dark background. The headline is large, bold, and spans multiple lines. The illustration is bordered by the page layout and sits above a longer paragraph of smaller white text. An orange icon and orange-highlighted words appear in the lower paragraph, where some names and roles are highlighted with orange text. The camera angle is a straight-on view of the phone screen content.

Visible text includes:  
13.46  
Heavily Armed High Sc...  
crunchyroll.com  
Crunchyroll news  
Diterbitkan: 5 JUNI 2026, 17:22 GMT+8  
Diperbarui: 5 JUNI 2026, 17:22 GMT+8  
Adaptasi Anime tentang  
Siswi SMA Bersejata Berat  
Diumumkan Tayang pada  
Tahun 2027  
Serial ini juga menginspirasi lini  
figurin yang populer.  
Liam Dempsey  
Good Smile Company hari ini mengumumkan  
bahwa adaptasi anime TV dari seri Heavily Armed  
High School Girls karya ilustator neco , yang  
menginspirasi lini figurin populer, sedang dalam  
produksi untuk penayangan tahun 2027. Masaki  
Tachibana (Princess Principal) bertindak  
sebagai sutradara dan Natsuko Takahashi (Anne  
Shirley) sebagai produser bertindak sebagai  
komposer serial ini.

Practical Summary: The image shows a Crunchyroll news article displayed on a smartphone screen in Indonesian. It features a large multi-line headline, a publish/update time stamp, an author name, a close-up anime illustration, and a longer descriptive paragraph with some highlighted orange text.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

# Structured Version

## Tanggal
- Diterbitkan: 5 JUNI 2026, 17:22 GMT+8  
- Diperbarui: 5 JUNI 2026, 17:22 GMT+8  

## Judul
**Adaptasi Anime tentang Siswi SMA Bersenjata Berat Diumumkan Tayang pada Tahun 2027**

## Subteks
Serial ini juga menginspirasi lini figurin yang populer.

## Penulis
- Liam Dempsey

## Isi Artikel
Good Smile Company hari ini mengumumkan  
bahwa adaptasi anime TV dari seri *Heavily Armed High School Girls* karya ilustrator neco , yang menginspirasi lini figurin populer, sedang dalam produksi untuk penayangan tahun 2027. Masaki Tachibana ( *Princess Principal* ) bertindak sebagai sutradara dan Natsuko Takahashi ( *Anne Shirley* ) sebagai *produser* bertindak sebagai komposer serial ini.

## Notes
- Ada bagian yang tampak seperti pengulangan/frasa yang janggal pada kalimat: “sebagai *produser* bertindak sebagai komposer serial ini.” (teks tetap diekstrak apa adanya).

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
